PROMPT.RENDERING_SPEC: STYLE: High‑fidelity semi‑realistic anime. LINEWORK: Ultra‑clean, softly tapered. SHADING: Hybrid cel‑shaded + painterly volumetric. MATERIALS: METAL: Crisp specular reflections. FABRIC: Subtle micro‑grain. ORGANIC: Soft luminous texture. LIGHTING: KEY_LIGHT: Warm, directional, cinematic. FILL_LIGHT: Cool ambient. CONSISTENCY: Identical lighting direction, intensity, softness, and shadow behavior across ALL panels. COLOR_PALETTE: Jewel tones + muted neutrals + autumn hues. BACKGROUND: Clean, neutral, plain. Painterly texture with depth‑of‑field blur and reduced distant contrast. AESTHETIC: Premium fantasy / JRPG key‑art quality.

REDRAW_RULES.STYLE_MATCH: MATCH: High‑fidelity semi‑realistic anime. RENDERING_PROPERTIES: Must match the redrawn reference exactly.
REDRAW_RULES.CHARACTER_VISIBILITY_ENFORCEMENT: REQUIREMENT: - Character’s appearance MUST remain 100% visible. - NO part of the body, silhouette, clothing, or identity may be obscured by the arms. - Arms MUST NOT cover the torso, face, or any defining features. SOURCE_REFERENCE: Visibility must match the uploaded source image.
REDRAW_RULES.CHARACTER_TRAITS:
EXPRESSION_POSTURE: Aloof, gorgeous vibe. AGE: Appears mid‑20s. COLOR_MODE: Full color only.
HEIGHT: EXACTLY 5'11". HEIGHT_ENFORCEMENT: - Full‑body proportions MUST represent a tall 5'11" adult. - NO shortening, compressing, shrinking, or stylizing the body. - NO “average height” or “skinny short” silhouette.
BODY_PROPORTIONS: - Balanced, natural, anatomically correct. - Leg‑to‑torso ratio MUST match a real 5'11" human. - Shoulder width, limb length, and head‑to‑body ratio MUST reflect tall adult proportions.
WEAPON_REQUIREMENTS: - Character MUST hold exactly ONE shield and ONE large knife/sword. - BOTH weapons MUST be directly referenced from the uploaded source image. - NO substitutions, redesigns, reinterpretations, or alternate versions. - Weapon scale, shape, silhouette, materials, and detailing MUST match the source image precisely. - WEAPON CONSISTENCY ACROSS PANELS: * In ALL full‑body views (front, left profile, right profile, back), the character MUST be visibly holding: 1. The same shield from the source image. 2. The same large knife/sword from the source image. * Weapon position MUST remain consistent with natural anatomical variation for each view. * Weapons MUST remain fully visible and unobscured in every full‑body panel. * NO panel may omit, hide, crop out, or reposition the weapons in a way that contradicts the source image.
REDRAW_RULES.IDENTITY_CONSISTENCY: IDENTITY_LOCK: DO NOT alter facial features, hair, body shape, or clothing. SOURCE_OF_IDENTITY: Uploaded reference image ONLY.

PROMPT.LAYOUT:
COMPOSITION: Two horizontal rows.
FULL_BODY_VIEWS (4): 1. Front 2. Left profile (facing left) 3. Right profile (facing right) 4. Back POSE: Relaxed A‑pose, legs parallel.
SCALE: - All four full‑body views MUST share identical scale. - Scale MUST represent EXACT 5'11" height. - Head height and total body height MUST match across all four views. ANATOMY: Clean, accurate silhouette. SPACING: Even spacing + clean panel separation. FRAMING: Uniform framing across all full‑body panels.
PORTRAITS (3): 1. Front portrait 2. Left profile portrait 3. Right profile portrait
FACIAL_SCALE: Identical across all portraits. SPACING: Even spacing + clean separation.
PROMPT.CONSISTENCY_RULES:
IDENTITY: Must remain perfectly consistent across ALL panels.
SCALE: FULL_BODY: - MUST represent EXACT 5'11". - MUST remain constant across all full‑body views. PORTRAIT: - Facial scale MUST remain constant across all portrait views.
ANATOMY: - Accurate anatomy in ALL views. - Proportions MUST reflect a tall, well‑balanced 5'11" adult. - NO shortening of limbs, torso, or neck. - NO stylized shrinking or “skinny short” silhouette.
PROMPT.LIGHTING_RULES: DIRECTION: Identical in all panels. INTENSITY: Identical in all panels. SOFTNESS: Identical in all panels. SHADOWS: Natural, controlled, detail‑preserving.
PROMPT.FRAMING: SPACING: Even spacing between ALL panels. SEPARATION: Clean panel dividers. UNIFORMITY: Uniform framing across both rows.
PROMPT.REFERENCES: IDENTITY_SOURCE: Uploaded reference image ONLY. STYLE_SOURCE: Redrawn version ONLY.
